markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define a content upsell proposal for the Relay client.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proposal:** A "content menu" for Relay, including a microsite project, expanded editorial, and content repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Microsites:** Replicate the successful Smith project (deep dives, supporting content) to fill Relay's new vertical-specific knowledge hubs.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Pricing:** Megan to draft a proposal by EOD Friday, pending approval from Andy and Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Bailey to send the proposal before the holiday break (Dec 24–Jan 5) and schedule a follow-up for early January.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

## Topics

### Relay's Upsell Request

  - [Relay is satisfied with current service (5 articles/week) and wants to expand content production.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [The client is open to suggestions, creating an opportunity for a "content menu" proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Key Initiative:** Build interactive microsites for a Q2 home services vertical launch.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create robust knowledge bases with quizzes, calculators, and editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Our Role:** Provide all editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Content is highly specific (e.g., "banking for plumbers"), requiring deep research where public info is scarce.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Proposed Solution: Replicating the Smith Project

  - [The Smith project is a direct model for Relay's microsite needs.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Smith Project Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [A knowledge hub with 6 topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
      - [Each cluster contains one 3–5k word deep-dive article and supporting content.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Relay Application:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Scope for 5–10 microsites (Bailey to confirm number).](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Use EXA in the Atlas workflow for research, which proved more effective than Tavoli for niche topics.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Client Guidance:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Show the Smith project's Figma mock-up (from Raise) to provide a concrete example and move the conversation from theory to a tangible product.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Recommend Raise as a design partner, as Relay is currently searching for one.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Additional Content Opportunities

  - [**Expanded Editorial:** Increase weekly article count (e.g., to 10–12).](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:** Convert existing assets (e.g., podcast episodes) into new formats (e.g., blog posts).](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Landing Page Optimization:** Improve SEO for product and customer-facing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Staffing & Timeline

  - [**Capacity:** A large, burst-activity project like the microsites may require additional staff beyond the current ME.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:** To manage capacity, propose a phased rollout (e.g., microsites first, then landing pages).](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [**Megan:** Deliver proposal to Bailey by EOD Friday, pending Andy/Bridget approval.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Send proposal to Relay before the holiday break (Dec 24–Jan 5).](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Schedule a follow-up call with Relay's Head of Marketing (Bethany) for early January.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [Draft Relay upsell proposal (pricing, scope, options) by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [Get proposal approved by Andy and Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Create a simple Lovable mock-up for the microsite concept.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [Confirm the target number of microsites with Relay tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Send the final proposal to Relay before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call with Relay's Head of Marketing for early January.](https://fathom.video/share/UBfcYTkVFN8F58QQo7HtuHqSrRy8z1N1?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
